D:\all\devemcu\gcc_arm\gccarm\bin\arm-none-eabi-gcc.exe  -mcpu=cortex-m3  -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -fdata-sections -ffunction-sections -O0 -g3 -g -mcpu=cortex-m3  -T "C:/Users/el/CLionProjects/xFreeRTOS/STM32F103C8Tx_FLASH.ld" --specs=nano.specs -Wl,-Map=xFreeRTOS.map -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--start-group -lc -lm -Wl,--end-group -Wl,--print-memory-usage
